raw_consumer_statement: Initial fraud report on XX/XX/XXXX. Followup on XX/XX/XXXX XXXX told XXXX would be complete by XX/XX/XXXX. Followed up XX/XX/XXXX XXXX told they have XXXX  days to respond and would be settled by XX/XX/XXXX. Followed up XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX representative very combative and argumentative would not tell me a date investigation would be settled by, only no response by merchants. Requested to speak with supervisor. XXXX returned, stated there had been no response from any merchants on disputes and merchants have XXXX billing cycles or XXXX days to respond and XX/XX/XXXX would be final day to respond by merchants. Statements attached for amounts and other information. This also damaged my credit report and lowered my scores. Unsure if Citi will correct this when all is done.
